IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.label: injury healing
IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.description: Healing that reduces the severity of normal injuries.

IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.label: scar healing
IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.description: Healing that reduces or removes scar severity.

IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.label: body part regrowth
IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.description: Healing that restores missing body parts over time.

IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.label: hediff severity healing
IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.description: Healing that reduces the severity of non-injury hediffs.

IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.label: vanilla healing
IsekaiAdventures.HealDef.description: Vanilla healing category. Only affected by TotalHealFactor.
